## Task Description
Implement all required CSS selectors as listed in the lab checklist.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Class, ID, universal, element, attribute selectors included
- [ ] Pseudo-class selector included
- [ ] All 4 combinators used (descendant, child, sibling, adjacent)
- [ ] :has() selector included
- [ ] Nested selector included
- [ ] Pushed via Pull Request
